templates.name: Rate Limit Exceeded
templates.template:
Hi {customer_name},

I see you're encountering 429 rate limit errors. Here's how to resolve this:

Current limits for your plan:
- {plan}: {limit} requests/minute

Recommendations:
1. Implement exponential backoff when receiving 429 responses
2. Check X-RateLimit-Remaining header to monitor usage
3. Consider upgrading to Business (1000/min) or Enterprise (10000/min)

I can request a temporary limit increase if needed.

Best regards,
Support Team
